parsed.final_response: You're hesitant to start a side project because it feels like another layer of work that will add to your anxiety, and you're unsure if it's the right move. That uncertainty is really understandable, especially given the pressure you feel to succeed in sustainable design. Maybe we can break it down further - what if you didn't have to commit to a full side project, but just dedicated a small amount of time to exploring your ideas, like sketching a prototype in a free time slot? Sometimes, taking tiny steps can help build momentum without feeling overwhelming.
